ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "project_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., ANKX, ANKY) */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, calibration required) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Ankle, Heel) */,
  "body_part" TEXT /* Body part where the sensor is placed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sensor position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data frame */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the session */,
  "ankx_value" REAL /* Value of the ANKX sensor */,
  "anky_value" REAL /* Value of the ANKY sensor */,
  "hee_ex_value" REAL /* Value of the HEEX sensor */,
  "hee_ey_value" REAL /* Value of the HEEY sensor */,
  "toe_ex_value" REAL /* Value of the TOEX sensor */,
  "toe_ey_value" REAL /* Value of the TOEY sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_frames_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation check */,
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data frame being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the validation check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("frame_id") REFERENCES data_frames ("frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., Sensor Failure, Data Corruption) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was detected */,
  "error_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleaned_data_frames" (
  "frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleaned data frame */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the frame belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the session */,
  "ankx_value" REAL /* Value of the ANKX sensor */,
  "anky_value" REAL /* Value of the ANKY sensor */,
  "hee_ex_value" REAL /* Value of the HEEX sensor */,
  "hee_ey_value" REAL /* Value of the HEEY sensor */,
  "toe_ex_value" REAL /* Value of the TOEX sensor */,
  "toe_ey_value" REAL /* Value of the TOEY sensor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the frame */,
  "cleaned_data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the cleaned data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleaned_data_frames_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_placements" (
  "placement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor placement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the sensor placement belongs to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used in the placement */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position where the sensor is placed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("placement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_placements_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_placements_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_placements_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES sensor_positions ("position_id")
)
